title: Epipactis lehmanniana

The genus Epipactis is a group of orchids that are typically terrestrial and have a distinctive appearance. Epipactis lehmanniana is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is a member of the subgenus Epipactis sect. Epipactis.
